articles.title: South Boston woman fatally stabbed boyfriend during an argument, police say
articles.description:
“She had black and blue finger marks on her throat, (and) he called her earlier that day and said he was coming to (her) house to kill her,” the woman's attorney said. “She's the victim.”

The post South Boston woman fatally stabbed boyfriend during an argument, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: South Boston woman fatally stabbed her boyfriend during a domestic argument on March 30.
Victim had previously threatened her life, according to the woman's attorney.
Incident raises concerns about domestic violence and safety in Boston neighborhoods.

articles.title: Patriots to be featured on HBO’s ‘Hard Knocks’ ahead of 2027 season

summary: Patriots will appear on HBO's 'Hard Knocks' for the 2027 season.
Seahawks and Patriots featured over the next two seasons, enhancing local fan engagement.
Boston residents can expect behind-the-scenes insights into the team's preparations.

summary: James Hagens scored his first points with the Providence Bruins on March 30.

articles.title: Could Patriots circle back with Stefon Diggs? Here’s what Eliot Wolf said of a potential reunion.

articles.title: Hawks surge past the Celtics 112-102, riding a big third quarter and a 13th straight home win
articles.description:
Three days after losing to the Celtics on the road, the Hawks responded with a 112-102 win over Boston on Monday night.

The post Hawks surge past the Celtics 112-102, riding a big third quarter and a 13th straight home win appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics lost to the Hawks 112-102 on March 30, 2026.
Hawks achieved their 13th consecutive home win with a strong third quarter.
This loss affects Celtics' playoff positioning and local fan morale.
